title: Cookie Clicker
description: The original idle game where you bake cookies to rule the universe. Click the big cookie, buy upgrades, and recruit grandmas to help you bake more cookies!

title: Run 3
description: Run, jump, and defy gravity in this classic space runner. Navigate through ever-changing tunnels and avoid falling into the void.

title: Retro Bowl
description: The perfect game for the armchair quarterback. Take control of your football team and lead them to glory in this retro-styled sports sim.
Join the numbers and get to the 2048 tile! A simple but addictive puzzle game where you slide tiles on a grid to combine them and reach the highest score.

title: Slope
description: A fast-paced 3D runner game where you control a ball rolling down a steep slope. Avoid obstacles and stay on the track as you accelerate to breakneck speeds.

title: Flappy Bird
description: Tap to fly and dodge the green pipes in this classic, notoriously difficult arcade game. How far can you get?

title: Drive Mad
description: A challenging monster truck driving game where you navigate through various obstacles and terrains. Balance your speed and control to reach the finish line without flipping over!

title: Slither
description: Grow your snake by consuming glowing orbs and outsmart other players in this addictive multiplayer arena game. Become the biggest snake on the leaderboard!

title: Ultrakill
description: A fast-paced, ultra-violent retro FPS. Maneuver through hellish environments, use blood to heal, and unleash stylish combos on your enemies in this intense shooter.

title: Tiny Fishing
description: Cast your line, catch as many fish as you can, and upgrade your gear to reach deeper waters. A relaxing and addictive fishing game!

title: Wall-E
description: In a distant future, a small waste-collecting robot inadvertently embarks on a space journey that will ultimately decide the fate of mankind.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: A Minecraft Movie
description: Based on the global phenomenon, A Minecraft Movie is the first-ever big-screen, live-action adaptation of the best-selling video game of all time.

title: John Wick: Chapter 1
description: An ex-hit-man comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that killed his dog and took everything from him.

title: John Wick: Chapter 2
description: After returning to the criminal underworld to repay a debt, John Wick discovers that a large bounty has been put on his life.

title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
description: Super-assassin John Wick is on the run after killing a member of the international assassin's guild, and with a $14 million price tag on his head, he is the target of hit men and women everywhere.

title: John Wick: Chapter 4
description: John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table. But before he can earn his freedom, Wick must face off against a new enemy with powerful alliances across the globe and forces that turn old friends into foes.

title: The Minions Movie
description: Minions Stuart, Kevin, and Bob are recruited by Scarlet Overkill, a supervillain who, alongside her inventor husband Herb, hatches a plot to take over the world.

title: Despicable Me
description: A mysterious super-villain has a plan to steal the moon, but his life changes when he meets three orphan girls who see him as a potential father.

title: Despicable Me 2
description: Gru is recruited by the Anti-Villain League to help deal with a powerful new super criminal.

title: Despicable Me 3
description: Gru meets his long-lost charming, cheerful, and more successful twin brother Dru who wants to team up with him for one last criminal heist.

title: Despicable Me 4
description: Gru and Lucy and their girls welcome a new member to the Gru family, Gru Jr., who is intent on tormenting his dad. Gru faces a new nemesis in Maxime Le Mal and his femme fatale girlfriend Valentina.

title: The Lorax
description: A 12-year-old boy searches for the one thing that will enable him to win the affection of the girl of his dreams. To find it he must discover the story of the Lorax, the grumpy yet charming creature who fights to protect his world.

title: Gladiator
description: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.

title: Gladiator II
description: Years after witnessing the death of the revered hero Maximus, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum after his home is conquered by the tyrannical Emperors who now lead Rome with an iron fist.
